clipr 0.8.1.9000
  • Reference
    • Developing with clipr
  • Changelog

clipr — Agent Instructions

Source: AGENTS.md

Repo type

R package (clipr): read/write system clipboard on macOS (pbpaste/pbcopy), Windows (readClipboard/writeClipboard), X11 (xclip/xsel), and Wayland (wl-copy/wl-paste).

Key commands

  • R -e "devtools::check()" — full R CMD check with vignettes
  • R -e "testthat::test_local()" — run all tests
  • R -e "roxygen2::roxygenise()" — regenerate man/ from roxygen comments (NAMESPACE is auto-generated)
  • R -e "pkgdown::build_site()" — build docs

Non-interactive mode: CLIPR_ALLOW

All public functions (read_clip, write_clip, etc.) refuse to run in non-interactive sessions unless CLIPR_ALLOW=TRUE is set as an env var or passed as allow_non_interactive = TRUE. Tests use this gate. Do not attempt to run clipr on CRAN — xclip/xsel fork background processes that cause check failures (#38).

Test structure

  • testthat suite in tests/testthat/, driven by tests/testthat.R (test_check("clipr"))
  • setup.R sets up is_clipr_available / skip_msg — every functional test calls skip_if_not(is_clipr_available, skip_msg)
  • CI runs R CMD check across macOS, Windows, and Ubuntu (xclip, xsel, wayland, none, nodisplay) with XVFB on Linux

File ownership

Area Files
Public API R/clipboard.R — exports: read_clip, write_clip, clear_clip, write_last_clip, read_clip_tbl, clipr_available, dr_clipr
Platform backends R/osx_clipboard.R, R/win_clipboard.R, R/linux_clipboard.R
Rendering logic R/flat_str.R — render_object(), table_str(), flat_str()
Utilities R/utils.R — sys_type(), clipr_available_handler(), messages, .onAttach

Conventions

  • README.md is generated from README.Rmd — edit the Rmd source only
  • NAMESPACE and man/ are auto-generated by roxygen2 (v7.3.0) — never hand-edit
  • Encoding: UTF-8, Language: en-US
  • Line endings are platform-aware in tests: Windows uses \r\n, Unix/macOS use \n

CI workflows (.github/workflows/)

  • R-CMD-check.yaml — main check matrix (uses env vars ALLOW_CLIP, CLIP_TYPE, DISPLAY)
  • test-coverage.yaml — Codecov coverage
  • pkgdown.yaml — docs deployment
  • pr-commands.yaml — PR-triggered actions

On this page

Developed by Matthew Lincoln.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
